---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change to the skill, the installers, the cross-vendor shims, or the tooling
title: '[idea] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What you'd like

The change you want. Be concrete.

## Why

What problem this solves, or what it would enable. The "why" matters more than the "what" here — the project is small and opinionated, so context helps decide whether it fits.

## Alternatives

Other things you considered. Doing nothing is also an alternative.

## Scope

Roughly: small / medium / large. If you'd be willing to send a PR, say so.
